trending_videos.description: The Ducks face the Golden Knights in Game 4 of the West second round at Honda Center. The Golden Knights lead 2-1 after a 6-2 Game 3 win. In Game 3, Mitch Marner had a historic performance, recording his first playoff hat trick and four points.

trending_videos.title: 72 Hours | Kevin Hart | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
A forty-year-old executive (Kevin Hart) hopes to save his flailing career by joining a group of twenty-somethings (Marcello Hernández, Mason Gooding, Kam Patterson, Ben Marshall) on a wild three-day bachelor party, after he’s inadvertently added to their group text.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81715790

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

72 Hours | Kevin Hart | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

diverse_channels.content_diversity: Each top channel represents a distinct category, indicating a diverse range of interests among viewers.
